memory:memory/2026-04-29.md:67:96.snippet: **Root Cause:** Line ~1104 in gmgn_scanner.py uses `data.get('token_data', {}).get('creation_timestamp', 0)` which is the STORED value from when token was first added to COOLDOWN_WATCH — not fresh GMGN data. If GMGN `created_timestamp` = 0 or missing, `creation_timestamp` defaults to 0 → `now - 0 = huge number` → age appears correct → BUY PASSES. **Fix needed:** Use GMGN `created_timestamp` from fresh_data at PUMP_VERIFY. memory:memory/2026-05-07.md:1:52.snippet: ## 2026-05-07 21:40 UTC - Age Filter Fix VERIFIED ### The Problem (FINALLY FIXED PERMANENTLY) DexScreener tokens showed age=0s because DexScreener API doesn't provide age or creation_timestamp. All DexScreener tokens were rejected by MIN_AGE filter. ### Root Cause The age check in `process_token()` happened BEFORE `get_token_data()` fetched fresh GMGN data: - DexScreener initial data: age=0 - Filter check: FAIL (age < 90) - GMGN data fetch: NEVER REACHED ### The Fix (VERIFIED WORKING) Moved GMGN data fetch to BEFORE age check: 1.
